main.description: A project that can include multiple hypercerts, each of which may be linked to at most one project.

shortDescription.description: A short description of this project

coverPhoto.description: The cover photo of this project (either in URI format or in a blob).

claims.description: Array of claims with their associated weights in this project

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created

claim.description: A strong reference to a hypercert claim record. This claim must conform to the lexicon org.hypercerts.claim.activity

weight.description: The weight/importance of this hypercert claim in the project (a percentage from 0-100, stored as a string to avoid float precision issues). The total claim weights should add up to 100.
